name: Black Widow Snack Cakes
recipeInstructions: Prepare the cake according to the package directions. Pour the batter into two 8-inch square aluminum foil pans coated with cooking spray and bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until done. Cool in the pans on wire racks. In a large bowl, combine 4 cups powdered sugar and 5-7 tablespoons milk. Spread a thin layer evenly over each cake. In a small zip-lock bag, mix 1 cup powdered sugar, cocoa, and 2 tablespoons milk. Seal the bag securely and snip a tiny hole in the corner. Pipe concentric circles onto each cake. Pipe straight lines at intervals from the inner circle to the outer circle, forming a web design. Garnish with plastic spiders.
